requirements.name: Network Security Controls
requirements.description: Install and maintain network security controls to protect the cardholder data environment.

requirements.name: Secure Configurations
requirements.description: Apply secure configurations to all system components to protect against known vulnerabilities.

requirements.name: Protect Stored Account Data
requirements.description: Protect stored account data through encryption, masking, hashing, and data retention policies.

requirements.name: Protect Data in Transit
requirements.description: Protect cardholder data with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks.

requirements.name: Protect Against Malware
requirements.description: Protect all systems against malware and maintain anti-malware software or programs.

requirements.name: Secure Systems & Software
requirements.description: Develop and maintain secure systems and software through vulnerability management and patching.

requirements.name: Restrict Access by Need-to-Know
requirements.description: Restrict access to system components and cardholder data by business need-to-know.

requirements.name: Identify Users & Authenticate Access
requirements.description: Identify users and authenticate access to system components using multi-factor authentication.

requirements.name: Restrict Physical Access
requirements.description: Restrict physical access to cardholder data and system components in data-sensitive areas.

requirements.name: Log & Monitor All Access
requirements.description: Log and monitor all access to system components and cardholder data with audit trails.

requirements.name: Test Security Regularly
requirements.description: Test security of systems and networks regularly through vulnerability scans and penetration testing.

requirements.name: Organizational Policies & Programs
requirements.description: Support information security with organizational policies, programs, and incident response planning.
